name: create-vision-reel
description: Create a local, deterministic product-film project with rendering and quality checks included.

scripts.gallery:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('gallery/manifest.json','utf8')); for (const i of m.items) if(!fs.existsSync(i.asset)) throw new Error('Missing gallery asset '+i.asset); console.log('gallery ok')"
scripts.check: npm run scan:ip && npm run check:timing && npm run gallery:check && npm run check:scripts && npm run check:json && npm run check:links && npm test
scripts.check:scripts: node --check bin/create-vision-reel.cjs && node --check starter/render/render.cjs && node --check starter/render/render-sample.cjs && node --check starter/scripts/ip-scan.cjs && node --check starter/scripts/blank-frame-check.cjs && node --check starter/scripts/contact-sheet.cjs && node --check starter/scripts/timing-spot-check.cjs && node --check starter/scripts/link-check.cjs && node --check starter/scripts/make-gif.cjs
